mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_teacher_attendance WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND attendance_date = #{attendanceDate}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_teacher_attendance SET check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, check_in_location = #{checkInLocation}, check_out_time = #{checkOutTime}, check_out_location = #{checkOutLocation}, status = #{status}, leave_type = #{leaveType}, leave_reason = #{leaveReason} WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
